title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.140 - Commission members not personally liable on notes or bonds
text:
215.140.  Commission members not personally liable on notes or bonds. — No member of the commission or any authorized person executing the notes or bonds shall be liable personally on the notes or bonds or be subject to any personal liability or accountability by reason of the issuance thereof.
(L. 1969 H.B. 130 § 22)
